thranduil.name: Thranduil the Wise
thranduil.title: Former High Council Leader

perk.name: Diplomatic Mastery
perk.description: Unlocks negotiation in hostile events, +0.3 diplomacy

thranduil.backstory: Led the council for 200 years. His followers are loyal but aging.

aelindra.name: Aelindra Swifthunter
aelindra.title: Master of the Hunt

perk.name: Expert Foraging
perk.description: +60% food from hunting, +60% medicine from foraging

aelindra.backstory: Knows every beast and plant in the forest. Small but skilled group.

miriel.name: Miriel Starweaver
miriel.title: Archmage of the Grove

perk.name: Arcane Knowledge
perk.description: +3 mana per day for use at shrines and magical events

miriel.backstory: The most powerful mage. Her arcane research made her wealthy.

kael.name: Kael Ironbark
kael.title: Captain of the Guard

perk.name: Tactical Warfare
perk.description: +50% combat power — follower losses in battle reduced by 33%

kael.backstory: Veteran warrior with disciplined soldiers. They earn little but fight hard.

lyra.name: Lyra Moonwhisper
lyra.title: High Priestess

perk.name: Divine Blessing
perk.description: +40% healing power — more medicine from foraging, faster recovery on rest

lyra.backstory: Beloved by the faithful. Temple donations fund her small but devoted group.

fenris.name: Fenris Shadowstep
fenris.title: Master Scout
fenris.backstory: Knows every shortcut. His large scout company moves fast but travels light.

aldric.name: Aldric Goldleaf
aldric.title: Merchant Guildmaster
aldric.backstory: Wealthy and connected. His caravan is small but very well-supplied.

thalion.name: Thalion Earthshaper
thalion.title: Master Builder

perk.name: Engineering Genius
perk.description: +50% weather resistance — storm follower and food losses halved

thalion.backstory: Built the great halls. His large workforce is well-paid but his perk is situational.

seraphina.name: Seraphina Dawnbringer
seraphina.title: Oracle of the Stars

perk.name: Foresight
perk.description: +40% luck — events fire nearly every day, giving more chances at good outcomes

seraphina.backstory: Wealthy patrons fund her prophecies. Events find her group constantly.

vorian.name: Vorian the Unyielding
vorian.title: Berserker Chief

perk.name: Fearless Horde
perk.description: +70% combat power — follower losses in battle reduced by 41%

vorian.backstory: The largest warband. They never retreat, never surrender, never save money.
